- `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/clui/src/shell/hooks/useSkillDiscovery.ts` -- Hook scanning three-tier skill directories with override detection
- `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/clui/src/shell/hooks/useGit.ts` -- Hook polling git branch and diff stats
